items.name: Atmoshocker
items.description: ATMOSHOCKER!

items.name: Adurite Guitar of Rock Excellence
items.description: Rock out on this ulta-rare adurite guitar. It vibrates at a frequency to make tunes sound extra sweet. Use the keys: 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N', and 'M' to play different tunes. Hold shift while pressing to sharpen the notes.

items.name: Wooden Sword
items.description: Wooden swords and painted wings and ephemeral treasured things.

items.name: Baby Nessie Mount
items.description: You’re a long way from your loch, friend.

items.name: Paint Bucket
items.description: U has a bucket! This is a tool of mass vandalism. Hold down the left mouse button and drag to paint everything! Of course, you *could* put it to more constructive use, especially in a Group Building place.

items.name: 8-Bit Sword
items.description: Slash your foes into 8-bit pixels!  Click to slash and double click to lunge.

items.name: Green Balloon
items.description: Things are ballooning out of control!

items.name: Protest Sign: Save the Zombies
items.description: Just because they are flesh eating monsters doesn't mean they don't have rights!

items.name: Grimgold Periastron Beta
items.description: The sword men use to fight bears... in space.

items.name: Dragon's Blaze Sword
items.description: Straight from the dragon's mouth - a flame to consume all.  Your received this sword for free if you redeemed a ROBLOX card from GameStop from February 1st, 2013 to February 28th, 2013.

items.name: Taxi
items.description: There's no better way to get around ROBLOX!  Be careful though - if you hit other players it will do damage!

items.name: Dual Darkhearts
items.description: It's twice as dark as RGB(0,0,0) and it steals life from your enemies. What more is there to say?

items.name: Bombo's Bow and Arrow
items.description: Killer instincts lead to killer arrows.

items.name: Noobcaik
items.description: Throw this to a friend to spam him with noobish comments.  He will be temporarily blinded.

items.name: Cavalry Sabre
items.description: You're ready to defend the Wild West with this sabre!

items.name: Linked Sword
items.description: With blood and iron.

items.name: Bloxiade
items.description: As a Robloxian athlete, I know how important it is to stay hydrated.  I like to stay hydrated with Bloxiade.  I think it makes me run faster, and my coach does too!

items.name: Red Stratobloxxer
items.description: How to rock: 1) Equip Red Stratobloxxer. 2) Change notes by pressing [f,g,h,j,k,l] 3) Left click.

items.name: Caltrops
items.description: An endless supply of spikey little traps that you can use to cover your path.

items.name: Ghostwalker
items.description:
The boast of heraldry, the pomp of power, /
And all that beauty, all that wealth e'er gave, /
Awaits alike th' inevitable hour:- /
The paths of glory lead but to the grave.

items.name: Captain Steelshanks Recruiting Staff
items.description: Captain Steelshanks is recruiting a crew for his vessel, the Ironsides.  Don't want to be a pirate?  Too bad.

items.name: Fake C4
items.description:
Tick tick tick...this one's a dud!  Prank your friends with
this fake C4.

items.name: Chartreuse Periastron Gamma
items.description: The sword men use to fight dinosaurs in space.

items.name: Staff of the Woodlands
items.description: Druids of the Great Forest use the mystical powers of this wooden staff to camouflage themselves as they travel through the hinterlands. Use of this staff renders your character difficult to see for a short while.

items.name: ROBLOX World Tour Hot Air Balloon
items.description: This thing will take you on a world tour of ROBLOX in 80 days or less!  Not really, but it will fly you and a buddy around the level and make you look awesome in your avatar thumbnail.  Our first personal transport vehicle for two!

items.name: Towering Inferno Sword
items.description: Raise fire to the heavens!

items.name: Ghostfire Dagger
items.description: Does tremendous damage. If you KO your opponent, you'll steal his extra health.

items.name: Rainbow Disco Hyperbike with Sidecar
items.description: Take a friend on your crazy hyperbike adventures!

items.name: Dark Pegasus
items.description: Fly around on your dark horse.
